refugees.name: Diplomat
refugees.buffByQuality: Alliance help / timer-reduction style building support scales with quality; higher tiers give stronger time value.
refugees.upgradeNotes: Highest priority upgrade target. Upgrade Purple and Gold versions first.

refugees.name: Nurse
refugees.buffByQuality: Hospital/healing support buff scales by quality tier.
refugees.upgradeNotes: Second priority after Diplomat. Upgrade Purple and Gold only.

refugees.name: Officer
refugees.buffByQuality: Military/training support buff scales by quality tier.
refugees.upgradeNotes: Third priority after Diplomat and Nurse. Upgrade Purple and Gold only.

refugees.name: Butler
refugees.buffByQuality: Gold Butler base: Construction Speed +25%. Upgrade chips add free speedup duration (+18s per chip, +90s per completed star).
refugees.upgradeNotes: Collect, but do not upgrade under current resource plan.

refugees.name: Scientist
refugees.buffByQuality: Research-related support buff scales with quality.
refugees.upgradeNotes: Collect, but do not upgrade under current resource plan.

refugees.name: Shooter Instructor
refugees.buffByQuality: Shooter training support buff scales with quality.
refugees.upgradeNotes: Collect all instructors; do not upgrade under current resource plan.

refugees.name: Assaulter Instructor
refugees.buffByQuality: Assaulter training support buff scales with quality.
refugees.upgradeNotes: Collect all instructors; do not upgrade under current resource plan.

refugees.name: Rider Instructor
refugees.buffByQuality: Rider training support buff scales with quality.
refugees.upgradeNotes: Collect all instructors; do not upgrade under current resource plan.

refugees.name: Metallurgist
refugees.buffByQuality: Metal production/support buff scales with quality.
refugees.upgradeNotes: Lower priority. Avoid upgrades while core priorities are unfinished.

refugees.name: Community Manager
refugees.buffByQuality: General support buff scales with quality.

refugees.name: Farmer
refugees.buffByQuality: Food production/support buff scales with quality.

refugees.name: Lumberjack
refugees.buffByQuality: Wood production/support buff scales with quality.

refugees.name: Mechanic
refugees.buffByQuality: Mechanical/maintenance support buff scales with quality.

refugees.name: Merchant
refugees.buffByQuality: Trade/economy support buff scales with quality.

refugees.name: Stamina Trainer
refugees.buffByQuality: Stamina-related support buff scales with quality.
